chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.D-941 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 16-5-2025 Mr. Alam Sher Khan Bozdar, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Statement submitted by DIG Police, Sukkur Range is taken on record. Learned Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition for the time being. Accordingly, the instant petition is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
